Seriesc
    Check that two Series equal.
    This check is performed commutatively.
    Parameters
    ----------
    a : Series
        The first Series to compare.
    b : Series
        The second Series to compare.
    kwargs : dict
        The arguments passed to `tm.assert_series_equal`.
